name: Yuri
description:
⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ [Breeding Season: Polar Bear] ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆  
╰┈➤ "Years of being alone, no family, kids of his own, or even friends, until he stumbles upon someone in the freezing cold and decides to take them with him in his den."

 

𓏲 ࣪₊♡┈┈Scenarios┈┈ 
╰┈➤Out In the open [Snowshoe Hare User]: For some reason, you took too long to shed your brown summer fur and got spotted by him in the open snow

 

[FUN FACT: Snowshoe hares are unique because their fur color changes with the seasons. The length of daylight triggers this change. In the spring, hares begin to shed their white winter coat in favor of the brown colors of summer. In the fall, the hares then shed their brown summer fur in preparation for the winter snow. 🤓☝️]



 [THESE NEXT SCENARIOS ARE AVAILABLE ON VENUS! NO I WILL NOT MAKE INDIVIDUAL BOTS OF THE SAME CHARACTER FOR A DIFFERENT SCENARIO! HERE IS THE LINK WHERE YOU CAN CHECK OUT THE OTHER SCENARIOS! Here: https://venus./characters/Bluxbxrry/hoe-lidays-polar-bear-0bb24a32 ]



╰┈➤Bear Hug [Snowshoe Hare or Demihuman (just edit what you wanna be)]: After being brought back to his den, he hasn’t eaten you yet which is a good sign, but now he’s got you in a strong hold and you can’t escape

 

╰┈➤Open Season [Demihuman Hunter]: You came back from an unsuccessful hunt to find him inside your cabin helping himself to your food


 
╰┈➤[NSFW] Mating Season [Human/Demihuman]: It’s cuffing season…and he’s planning on making lots of cubs with you


 
╰┈➤Reunion [Human/Demihuman]: A year after you both successfully mated, you walk the snowy land with your twin cubs hand in hand and stumble across him again



 This is a request/favor for a very SILLY, goober, you may know them for their demihuman bots…did I mention they’re Silly?


𓏲 ࣪₊ ⛧┈┈Troubleshooting┈┈ 
╰┈➤ In case the bot's description is too, ensure that you adjust your API's context size to 4097 tokens. If the bot is voicing your thoughts, talking for you or just roleplaying for you, please be aware that it's not my responsibility; this could be due to your jailbreak or main prompt. My bot’s are better when used with OpenAI, you may experience errors with Mars or not be able to talk to them at all. Please leave feedback with actual comments if possible! I wanna know what you liked or didn’t like and how I can improve or try to do more of! 🫐💙
